Package com.example.server.game.controller

Class GameController

  • Method Details

    • createGame

      @PostMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<GameResponse> createGame(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid CreateGameRequest request)

      @PostMapping("/{gameId}/registrations") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<GameRegistrationResponse> submitGameRegistration(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long gameId)

      @PostMapping("/{gameId}/registrations/cancel") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<GameRegistrationResponse> cancelGameRegistration(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long gameId)

      @GetMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<GameListItemResponse>> getPublicGames(@RequestParam(required=false) String city)

      @GetMapping("/my") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<GameListItemResponse>> getMyGames(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails)

      @GetMapping("/my/{gameId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<GameResponse> getMyGameById(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long gameId)

    • updateMyGame

      @PutMapping("/my/{gameId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<GameResponse> updateMyGame(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long gameId, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid UpdateGameRequest request)

    • updateMyGameStatus

      @PostMapping("/my/{gameId}/status") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<GameResponse> updateMyGameStatus(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long gameId, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid UpdateGameStatusRequest request)

      @PostMapping("/my/{gameId}/start") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<GameStartResponse> startGame(@AuthenticationPrincipal org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.UserDetails userDetails, @PathVariable Long gameId)
